name: flashgather

scripts.dev: concurrently -n backend,frontend -c green,blue "npm --prefix backend run dev" "npm --prefix frontend run dev"
scripts.start: concurrently -n backend,frontend -c green,blue "npm --prefix backend run start" "npm --prefix frontend run dev"
scripts.install:all: npm --prefix backend install && npm --prefix frontend install

description: The active app folders live at the repository root:
